title: Green Card Holders Targeted for Deportation by New ‘Removal Apparatus’ - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Green Card Holders Targeted for Deportation by New ‘Removal Apparatus’
A report from The New York Times examines the Department of Homeland Security’s expanded efforts to review and potentially remove certain lawful permanent residents through a newly created “Tactical Operations Division.” Kerry E. Doyle noted that while removal proceedings involving green card holders are not unheard of, they have historically been far less common.
